body:
## Summary
- Add a structured Sepo setup Issue Form for agent handle, assignment, project-management mode, Project creation/linking, Project owner/title, planning fields, and plan/apply confirmation.
- Document that setup issues are declarative and do not mutate variables or GitHub Projects.
- Add focused coverage for the setup template contract.

## Verification
- `npm --prefix .agent run build`
- `node --test .agent/dist/__tests__/issue-template.test.js`
- `ruby -e 'require "yaml"; YAML.load_file(".github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/sepo-setup.yml")'`
- `git diff --check`

Closes #144

comments.body:
Sepo is dispatching follow-up automation.

| Source | Next | Target | Round | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| implement | review | PR #145 | 3 / 40 | Dispatched |

Reason: implementation succeeded; dispatching review

<!-- sepo-agent-handoff state:dispatched created:1777935319851 base64:aGFuZG9mZjpzZWxmLWV2b2x2aW5nL3JlcG86MjUzNDc4NDEwMDM6aW1wbGVtZW50OjE0NDpyZXZpZXc6MTQ1OjM -->

## Rubrics Review

| Total Score | Verdict | Rubrics Scored |
| -- | -- | -- |
| 100 | PASS | 5 |

| Dimension | Rubric | Result | Score | Evidence |
| -- | -- | -- | -- | -- |
| coding_workflow / generic | Prefer explicit structured inputs | pass | 7/7 | `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/sepo-setup.yml` uses separate Issue Form fields for `agent-handle`, `assign-to-agent`, `project-management-mode`, `github-project`, Project owner/title, statuses, Priority/Effort/Release choices, and confirmation instead of free-form setup text. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Keep docs in sync | pass | 7/7 | `.agent/docs/architecture/project-planning.md` adds a “Setup issue template” section documenting the new template, its declarative boundary, and the future `/setup plan` / `/setup apply` split. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Make surgical changes | pass | 8/8 | The diff is tightly scoped to the setup issue template, one focused test file, and the relevant project-planning docs. It does not implement the deferred `/setup` route, repo variable mutation, Project creation/linking, or field sync from issue #144. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Reuse existing code | pass | 8/8 | Tests use the repo’s existing `node:test` style and the existing `yaml` dependency already used by the agent test suite, with small local helpers only for parsing/asserting the new template contract. |
| coding_workflow / generic | Read docs and linked context first | pass | 6/6 | The PR matches the linked parent plan from #126 and child issue #144: minimal Project statuses, Project-backed planning as experimental, no default priority/effort repo-label expansion, and setup as a plan-first declarative issue template. |

## Notes

- The strongest score drivers are the structured Issue Form contract and the explicit non-mutating boundary. Those directly satisfy the staged task: capture setup intent now while leaving privileged `/setup apply` behavior for later.
- The docs and tests cover the important user-facing contract without expanding scope.
- No rubric-specific follow-up needed.

## Findings

- **INFO:** No rubric-specific issues found. The selected applicable rubrics are satisfied by the PR diff and linked issue context.

## Final Rubric Verdict

PASS

## AI Review Synthesis

<!-- sepo-agent-review-synthesis -->

> Dual-agent review by **Claude** and **Codex**.
> Requested by @lolipopshock.

## Summary of PR/Issue
PR #145 adds the structured Sepo setup Issue Form requested by child issue #144 under parent planning issue #126. The form captures setup intent for agent handle, assignment, project-management mode, Project creation/linking, Project owner/title, planning fields, and plan/apply confirmation. It intentionally keeps setup declarative only: no `/setup` route, repo variable mutation, GitHub Project mutation, or Project field sync is implemented in this child. The PR also documents that boundary and adds focused YAML/template contract tests.

## Review
All reviewer outputs converge on SHIP. The only notes raised were INFO-level polish suggestions, and none affect correctness, safety, the staged scope, or the automation boundary.

| Issue | Severity | Description |
| -- | -- | -- |
| No required actionable findings | INFO | Codex and rubrics review found no actionable issues; Claude noted optional UX/test polish only. No branch change is required before merge. |

## Progress
- PR discussion already includes a passing rubrics review with 100/100.
- Existing inline review comments were checked; none were present.
- Optional notes include clarifying the Project title field, using raw YAML text in one assertion, and asserting checkbox option count, but reviewers did not consider these merge-blocking.
- Deferred `/setup plan`, `/setup apply`, repo variables, Project creation/linking, and Project sync are correctly left out of scope for this child.

## Recommended Next Step
NO_AUTOMATED_ACTION: no unresolved required branch-change work remains, and further changes would be optional maintainer polish.

## Final Verdict
SHIP

## Action Items
- [ ] No required branch-change work remains.

title: Add Sepo setup issue template
